panels.label: Steering
panels.description: Lateral control, lane changes, and steering behavior

items.title: Enable Modular Assistive Driving System (MADS)
items.description: Enable the beloved MADS feature. Disable toggle to revert back to stock sunnypilot engagement/disengagement.

items.title: Toggle with Main Cruise
items.description: Note: For vehicles without LFA/LKAS button, disabling this will prevent lateral control engagement.

items.title: Unified Engagement Mode (UEM)
items.description: Engage lateral and longitudinal control with cruise control engagement. Note: Once lateral control is engaged via UEM, it will remain engaged until it is manually disabled via the MADS button or car shut off.

items.title: Steering Mode on Brake Pedal
items.description: Choose how Automatic Lane Centering (ALC) behaves after the brake pedal is manually pressed in sunnypilot.

sections.title: Blinker Control
sections.description: Lateral pause behavior during turn signals

sub_items.title: Minimum Speed to Pause Lateral Control
Post-Blinker Delay
sub_items.description: Delay before lateral control resumes after the turn signal ends.

items.title: Pause Lateral Control with Blinker
items.description: Pause lateral control with blinker when traveling below the desired speed selected.

sections.title: Torque Control
sections.description: Steering torque tuning and lateral control method

items.title: Enforce Torque Lateral Control
items.description: Enable this to enforce sunnypilot to steer with Torque lateral control.

items.title: Self-Tune
items.description: Enables self-tune for Torque lateral control for platforms that do not use Torque lateral control by default.

items.title: Less Restrict Settings for Self-Tune (Beta)
items.description: Less strict settings when using Self-Tune. This allows torqued to be more forgiving when learning values.

items.title: Enable Custom Tuning
items.description: Enables custom tuning for Torque lateral control. Modifying Lateral Acceleration Factor and Friction below will override the offline values indicated in the YAML files within "opendbc/car/torque_data". The values will also be used live when "Manual Real-Time Tuning" toggle is enabled.

items.title: Manual Real-Time Tuning
items.description: Enforces the torque lateral controller to use the fixed values instead of the learned values from Self-Tune. Enabling this toggle overrides Self-Tune values.

items.title: Torque Control Tune Version
items.description: Select the version of Torque Control Tune to use.

sections.title: Lane Change
sections.description: Automatic lane change timing and behavior

items.title: Auto Lane Change by Blinker
items.description: Set a timer to delay the auto lane change operation when the blinker is used. No nudge on the steering wheel is required to auto lane change if a timer is set. Default is Nudge. Please use caution when using this feature. Only use the blinker when traffic and road conditions permit.

items.title: Auto Lane Change: Delay with Blind Spot
items.description: Toggle to enable a delay timer for seamless lane changes when blind spot monitoring (BSM) detects an obstructing vehicle, ensuring safe maneuvering.

panels.label: Cruise
panels.description: Longitudinal control, speed limits, and cruise behavior

items.title: Dynamic Experimental Control
items.description: Enable toggle to allow the model to determine when to use sunnypilot ACC or sunnypilot End to End Longitudinal.

items.title: Disengage Cruise on Accelerator Pedal
items.description: When enabled, pressing the accelerator pedal will disengage longitudinal control.

items.title: Driving Personality
items.description: Standard is recommended. In aggressive mode, sunnypilot will follow lead cars closer and be more aggressive with the gas and brake. In relaxed mode sunnypilot will stay further away from lead cars. On supported cars, you can cycle through these personalities with your steering wheel distance button.

sections.title: Speed Limits
sections.description: Speed limit detection and offset behavior

items.title: Vision
items.description: Use vision path predictions to estimate the appropriate speed to drive through turns ahead.

items.title: Map
items.description: Use map data to estimate the appropriate speed to drive through turns ahead.

panels.label: Display
panels.description: Screen brightness, timeout, and interactivity settings

sections.title: Brightness & Timeout
sections.description: Screen dimming and sleep behavior while driving

items.title: Interactivity Timeout
items.description: Apply a custom timeout for settings UI. This is the time after which settings UI closes automatically if user is not interacting with the screen.

panels.label: Visuals
panels.description: HUD overlays, alerts, and on-screen display elements

sections.title: HUD Elements
sections.description: Overlays shown on the driving screen

items.title: Show Blind Spot Warnings
items.description: Enabling this will display warnings when a vehicle is detected in your blind spot as long as your car has BSM supported.

items.title: Steering Arc
items.description: Display steering arc on the driving screen when lateral control is enabled.

items.title: Display Turn Signals
items.description: When enabled, visual turn indicators are drawn on the HUD.

items.title: Display Road Name
items.description: Displays the name of the road the car is traveling on. The OpenStreetMap database of the location must be downloaded to fetch the road name.

items.title: Standstill Timer
items.description: Show a timer on the HUD when the car is at a standstill.

items.title: Real-time Acceleration Bar
items.description: Show an indicator on the left side of the screen to display real-time vehicle acceleration and deceleration. This displays what the car is currently doing, not what the planner is requesting.

items.title: Developer UI
items.description: Display real-time parameters and metrics from various sources.

items.title: Speedometer: Always Display True Speed
items.description: For applicable vehicles, always display the true vehicle current speed from wheel speed sensors.

items.title: Speedometer: Hide from Onroad Screen
items.description: When enabled, the speedometer on the onroad screen is not displayed.

sections.title: Alerts & Extras
sections.description: Traffic light alerts and visual flair

items.title: Green Traffic Light Alert (Beta)
items.description: A chime and on-screen alert will play when the traffic light you are waiting for turns green and you have no vehicle in front of you. On-screen visual alert is only available on comma 3X. Note: This chime is only designed as a notification. It is the driver's responsibility to observe their environment and make decisions accordingly.

items.title: Lead Departure Alert (Beta)
items.description: A chime and on-screen alert will play when you are stopped, and the vehicle in front of you start moving. On-screen visual alert is only available on comma 3X. Note: This chime is only designed as a notification. It is the driver's responsibility to observe their environment and make decisions accordingly.

items.title: Tesla Rainbow Mode
items.description: A beautiful rainbow effect on the path the model wants to take. It does not affect driving in any way.

items.title: Enable sunnypilot
items.description: Use the sunnypilot system for adaptive cruise control and lane keep driver assistance. Your attention is required at all times to use this feature.

items.title: Enable Lane Departure Warnings
items.description: Receive alerts to steer back into the lane when your vehicle drifts over a detected lane line without a turn signal activated while driving over 31 mph (50 km/h).

items.title: Always-On Driver Monitoring
items.description: Enable driver monitoring even when sunnypilot is not engaged.

items.title: Use Metric System
items.description: Display speed in km/h instead of mph.

sections.title: Recording
sections.description: Camera and audio recording during drives

items.title: Record and Upload Driver Camera
items.description: Upload data from the driver facing camera and help improve the driver monitoring algorithm.

items.title: Record and Upload Microphone Audio
items.description: Record and store microphone audio while driving. The audio will be included in the dashcam video in comma connect.

panels.label: Device
panels.description: Device behavior, units, and recording settings

items.title: Wake Up Behavior
items.description: Controls state of the device after boot/sleep. Default: Device will boot/wake-up normally and will be ready to engage. Offroad: Device will be in Always Offroad mode after boot/wake-up.

items.title: Max Time Offroad
items.description: Device will automatically shutdown after set time once the engine is turned off. 30h is the default.

items.title: Disable Updates
items.description: When enabled, automatic software updates will be off. This requires a reboot to take effect.

panels.label: Developer
panels.description: Debug tools, remote access, and advanced services

items.title: Enable ADB
items.description: ADB (Android Debug Bridge) allows connecting to your device over USB or over the network. See https://docs.comma.ai/how-to/connect-to-comma for more info.

items.title: sunnypilot Longitudinal Control (Alpha)
items.description: WARNING: sunnypilot longitudinal control is in alpha for this car and will disable Automatic Emergency Braking (AEB). On this car, sunnypilot defaults to the car's built-in ACC instead of sunnypilot's longitudinal control. Enable this to switch to sunnypilot longitudinal control. Enabling Experimental mode is recommended when enabling sunnypilot longitudinal control alpha. Changing this setting will restart sunnypilot if the car is powered on.

sections.title: Test Maneuvers
sections.description: DANGER: enabling these maneuvers replaces normal driving behavior with deterministic test sequences. Each toggle requires explicit confirmation per write. Use only in a closed environment.

items.title: [TEST] Lateral Maneuver Mode
items.description: Replaces normal lateral control with a deterministic test sequence. NOT for road use.

items.title: [TEST] Longitudinal Maneuver Mode
items.description: Replaces normal longitudinal control with a deterministic test sequence. NOT for road use.

items.title: Show Advanced Controls
items.description: Toggle visibility of advanced sunnypilot controls. This only changes the visibility of the toggles; it does not change the actual enabled/disabled state.

items.title: GitHub Runner Service
items.description: Enables or disables the GitHub runner service.

items.title: copyparty Service
items.description: copyparty is a very capable file server, you can use it to download your routes, view your logs and even make some edits on some files from your browser. Requires you to connect to your comma locally via its IP address.

panels.label: Models
panels.description: Driving model behavior and camera calibration

sections.title: Model Behavior
sections.description: Lane desire and lead-vehicle awareness tuning

items.title: Use Lane Turn Desires
items.description: If you are driving at 20 mph (32 km/h) or below and have your blinker on, the car will plan a turn in that direction at the nearest drivable path. This prevents situations (like at red lights) where the car might plan the wrong turn direction.

items.title: Adjust Lane Turn Speed
items.description: Set the maximum speed for lane turn desires.

items.title: Live Learning Steer Delay
items.description: Allow device to learn and adapt car's steering response time

items.title: Adjust Software Delay
items.description: Adjust the software delay when Live Learning Steer Delay is toggled off. The default software delay value is 0.2

sections.title: Lateral Control
sections.description: Neural network lateral control for supported models

items.title: Neural Network Lateral Control (NNLC)
items.description: Use a neural network for lateral control instead of the default torque controller.

items.title: Adjust Camera Offset
items.description: Virtually shift camera's perspective to move model's center to Left(+ values) or Right (- values)

items.title: Enforce Factory Longitudinal Control
items.description: sunnypilot will not take over control of gas and brakes. Factory Toyota longitudinal control will be used.

items.title: Stop and Go Hack (Alpha)
items.description: sunnypilot will allow some Toyota/Lexus cars to auto resume during stop and go traffic. This feature is only applicable to certain models that are able to use longitudinal control. This is an alpha feature. Use at your own risk.

items.title: Stop and Go for Manual Parking Brake (Beta)
